userStories.title: Single-style text overlay on video
userStories.description: As a ComfyUI user, I want to connect a VIDEO to `CoolTextOverlay` and specify a text string with a font, size, and color so that every frame of the output VIDEO has that text rendered at the position I specified.

acceptanceCriteria.text: The node accepts a VIDEO input and returns a VIDEO output of identical resolution, fps, and
A widget `text` (STRING) sets the full overlay text when no fragments are provided.
Widget `opacity` (FLOAT 0.0â€“1.0, default 1.0) blends the text into the frame.
Running the node with a 3-frame VIDEO produces an output VIDEO where all 3 frames contain the

userStories.title: Rich inline multi-fragment text overlay
userStories.description: As a ComfyUI user, I want to supply a JSON array of text fragments (each with its own `text`, `font_family`, `font_size`, `color`, `font_weight`) so that I can render composite labels (e.g., white normal word followed by a yellow bold word) burned into the video.

acceptanceCriteria.text: The node accepts an optional `fragments` input of type STRING containing a JSON array; when
Each fragment object must support keys: `text` (required), `font_family` (optional, falls
Fragments are laid out left-to-right on a single baseline; `pos_x`/`pos_y`/`align` apply to
Passing an invalid JSON string raises a `ValueError` with a human-readable message.
A VIDEO rendered with two fragments of different colors shows each fragment in its respective

userStories.title: Pillow font resolution
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the node to resolve font files robustly so that it does not crash on systems where a requested font family is not installed.

acceptanceCriteria.text: The node attempts to load the font via `ImageFont.truetype`; on `OSError` it falls back to
The fallback produces visible text in the output (no silent blank frames).
Font resolution is attempted once per unique `(font_family, font_size, font_weight)` tuple
